stage_contract.objective: Create a testable MoE stage-gate engine and Google Docs task-record adapter without changing active package behavior.
required_approvals: future activation of mandatory package gates
acceptance_criteria: schemas, prompts, engine, adapter, and fixtures exist
two independent evaluator reports are captured
no private Drive identifiers are committed

artifact.summary: A public-safe Python MoE stage-gate engine, a Google Docs adapter, versioned schemas/contracts/prompts, deterministic tests, and a private local configuration boundary were created.

side_effects: private Google Drive folder and task document only
unresolved_risks: live model output and package skill integration remain to be verified
stage_data.rollback: Revert the implementation commit and remove the private local configuration; no active workflow was changed.
